description: Escape-analysis enrichment: has_escape, escape_count, escape_tier (1 return / 2 address-of / 3 pointer-array alias), escape_kinds, escape_vars. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust source escapes plus C/C++ fixture escape patterns.

cases.name: has_escape_all
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_escape='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: escape_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/casts.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_escape='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: escape_tier_3_alias
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_escape='true' WHERE escape_tier='3' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: escape_tier_1_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_escape='true' WHERE escape_tier='1' LIMIT 20

cases.name: negative_no_escape_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_escape='true' LIMIT 5
